info.title: KeeperData Bridge API
info.description: API for the KeeperData Bridge service – manages data imports, cleanse analysis, external catalogue operations, OData-style queries, and throttle policies.

post.summary: Starts a new cleanse analysis operation
post.description: The analysis runs in the background and progress can be tracked via the returned operation ID.

409.description: A cleanse analysis is already running

post.summary: Requests cancellation of the currently running cleanse analysis
post.description: Automatically discovers the current running (or already-cancelling) operation — no operation ID is required. The cancellation flag is written to the database and the operation status transitions to `Cancelling`. The background pump polls this flag at each progress checkpoint (every `progressUpdateInterval` records as configured in the active throttle policy). At the next checkpoint the pump detects the flag, stops processing, and transitions the status to `Cancelled`. **Latency:** depends on the active throttle policy's `pumpBatchSize`, `pumpDelayMs`, and `progressUpdateInterval` — typically a few seconds to under a minute. **Idempotency:** calling this endpoint multiple times while the operation is in `Running` or `Cancelling` state is safe and returns 200. Once the operation has fully transitioned to `Cancelled`, subsequent calls return 404 because no in-progress operation exists. **Status visibility:** after calling this endpoint, polling `GET /api/cleanse/runs` or `GET /api/cleanse/run/{operationId}` will show status `Cancelling` (with live stats still populated) until the pump completes, at which point the status becomes `Cancelled` with `cancelledAtUtc` populated.

200.description: Cancellation requested successfully. The operation is now in `Cancelling` state.

404.description: No running or cancelling cleanse analysis operation found

post.summary: Deletes all cleanse report data (detected issues)
Deletes all cleanse analysis metadata (operation history)

get.summary: Gets a paginated list of analysis run summaries
get.description: Returns analysis run summaries in reverse chronological order.

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: Number of records to skip (default: 0)

parameters.name: top
parameters.description: Maximum number of records to return (default: 10, max: 100)

200.description: Paginated list of analysis run summaries

get.summary: Gets full details of a specific analysis run

parameters.name: operationId
parameters.description: The operation ID of the analysis run

200.description: Full details of the analysis run

get.summary: Gets a paginated, filterable, and sortable list of cleanse issues

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: Number of records to skip (default: 0)

parameters.name: top
parameters.description: Maximum number of records to return (default: 10, max: 100)

parameters.name: ctsLidFullIdentifier
parameters.description: Filter by CTS LID full identifier (contains, case-insensitive)

parameters.name: cph
parameters.description: Filter by CPH (contains, case-insensitive)

parameters.name: issueCode
parameters.description: Filter by exact issue code

parameters.name: ruleCode
parameters.description: Filter by exact rule code

parameters.name: errorCode
parameters.description: Filter by exact error code

parameters.name: isActive
parameters.description: Filter by active status

parameters.name: isIgnored
parameters.description: Filter by ignored status

parameters.name: resolutionStatus
parameters.description: Filter by resolution status (None, Todo, InProgress, Resolved)

parameters.name: assignedTo
parameters.description: Filter by assigned user

parameters.name: isUnassigned
parameters.description: Filter to unassigned issues only

parameters.name: createdAfterUtc
parameters.description: Filter issues created after this UTC time

parameters.name: createdBeforeUtc
parameters.description: Filter issues created before this UTC time

parameters.name: updatedAfterUtc
parameters.description: Filter issues updated after this UTC time

parameters.name: updatedBeforeUtc
parameters.description: Filter issues updated before this UTC time

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Field to sort by (default: LastUpdatedAtUtc)

parameters.name: sortDescending
parameters.description: Sort in descending order (default: true)

post.summary: Regenerates the presigned URL for an operation's report
post.description: Use this when the original presigned URL has expired.

parameters.name: operationId
parameters.description: The operation ID

post.summary: Sends a test notification email to verify GOV.UK Notify configuration
post.description: The test email is sent to test@example.com using the configured template.

parameters.name: issueId
parameters.description: The issue ID

post.summary: Removes the ignored flag from an issue

parameters.name: issueId
parameters.description: The issue ID

post.summary: Updates the resolution workflow status of an issue

parameters.name: issueId
parameters.description: The issue ID

post.summary: Assigns an issue to a user

parameters.name: issueId
parameters.description: The issue ID

post.summary: Clears the assigned user from an issue

parameters.name: issueId
parameters.description: The issue ID

get.summary: Gets a paginated list of history entries for a specific issue

parameters.name: issueId
parameters.description: The issue ID

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: Number of records to skip (default: 0)

parameters.name: top
parameters.description: Maximum number of records to return (default: 50, max: 100)

200.description: Paginated list of issue history entries

post.summary: Starts a bulk file import process asynchronously
post.description: Returns immediately with an import ID once the lock has been acquired. The import continues running in the background.

parameters.name: sourceType
parameters.description: The source type for the import ('internal' or 'external', default: 'external')

get.summary: Gets a paginated list of import summaries
get.description: Returns import summaries in reverse chronological order (most recent first).

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: Number of records to skip for pagination (default: 0)

parameters.name: top
parameters.description: Number of records to return (default: 10, max: 100)

get.summary: Gets the import report for a specific import ID
get.description: Includes overall import status, acquisition phase details, and ingestion phase details.

parameters.name: importId
parameters.description: The import ID to retrieve the report for

get.summary: Gets the file processing reports for all files in a specific import
get.description: Includes details about acquisition and ingestion for each file.

parameters.name: importId
parameters.description: The import ID to retrieve the file reports for

get.summary: Gets the paginated lineage events for a specific record
get.description: Shows the complete history of changes to a record across all imports. The recordId is a SHA256 hash generated by RecordIdGenerator from the composite key parts, making it URL-safe.

parameters.name: collectionName
parameters.description: The collection name (e.g., 'sam_cph_holdings')

parameters.name: recordId
parameters.description: The URL-safe record ID (SHA256 hash generated from primary key parts)

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: Number of events to skip for pagination (default: 0)

parameters.name: top
parameters.description: Number of events to return (default: 10, max: 100)

delete.summary: Deletes a specific MongoDB collection by name
delete.description: The collection name must be defined in DataSetDefinitions.

parameters.name: collectionName
parameters.description: The name of the collection to delete

delete.summary: Deletes all MongoDB collections defined in DataSetDefinitions
Deletes a specific reporting/lineage MongoDB collection by name
delete.description: Valid collections: import_reports, import_files, record_lineage, record_lineage_events.

parameters.name: collectionName
parameters.description: The name of the reporting collection to delete

delete.description: Includes: import_reports, import_files, record_lineage, record_lineage_events. These collections will be automatically recreated when the next import runs.

post.summary: Generates a URL-safe record ID from composite key parts using SHA256 hashing
post.description: Helps clients construct the recordId needed for lineage queries.

delete.summary: Deletes all objects from the internal target storage
delete.description: Clears down all files that were ingested into the target internal storage under the configured top-level folder prefix.

parameters.name: sourceType
parameters.description: The source type for the storage (default: 'internal')

get.summary: Gets a plain text report of available files for a specified source type

parameters.name: sourceType
parameters.description: The source type ('internal' or 'external')

parameters.name: days
parameters.description: Number of days to look back for files

200.description: Plain text report of available files

post.summary: Uploads a file to internal S3 storage
post.description: The filename must conform to one of the dataset definition patterns.

parameters.name: objectKey
parameters.description: The filename (object key) for the file in S3 – should not contain path separators

422.description: Validation error (invalid file, object key, or filename pattern)

post.summary: Uploads raw file content to internal S3 storage
post.description: Alternative endpoint for testing with raw file content. The filename must conform to one of the dataset definition patterns.

parameters.name: objectKey
parameters.description: The filename (object key) for the file in S3 – should not contain path separators

get.summary: Query a MongoDB collection with OData-style parameters

parameters.name: collectionName
parameters.description: Name of the collection to query (e.g., 'sam_cph_holdings')

parameters.name: $filter
parameters.description: OData $filter expression (e.g., "CPH eq 'ABC123' and IsDeleted eq false")

parameters.name: $orderby
parameters.description: OData $orderby expression (e.g., "UpdatedAtUtc desc")

parameters.name: $select
parameters.description: OData $select expression (e.g., "CPH,UpdatedAtUtc,IsDeleted")

parameters.name: $skip
parameters.description: Number of records to skip for pagination

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Number of records to return (max 1000, default 100)

parameters.name: $count
parameters.description: Whether to include total count in response (default: true)

schema.description: Query results with data and pagination metadata

get.summary: Gets the currently active throttle policy
Gets a throttle policy by slug

parameters.name: slug
parameters.description: The slug identifier of the throttle policy

parameters.name: slug
parameters.description: The slug identifier of the throttle policy to update

parameters.name: slug
parameters.description: The slug identifier of the throttle policy to delete

parameters.name: slug
parameters.description: The slug identifier of the throttle policy to activate

StartAnalysisResponse.description: Response when a cleanse analysis is successfully started.

operationId.description: Unique identifier for the started analysis operation.

startedAtUtc.description: UTC timestamp when the analysis was started.

CancelAnalysisResponse.description: Response when a cleanse analysis cancellation is successfully requested.

requestedAtUtc.description: UTC timestamp when the cancellation was requested.

CleanseRunStatsDto.description: Live performance statistics for a running cleanse analysis operation.

currentRpm.description: Current records per minute rate based on the latest sliding window.

averageRpm.description: Average records per minute over the entire process lifetime.

projectedEndUtc.description: Projected UTC end time based on window RPM and remaining records. Null if not calculable.

estimatedDurationRemainingSeconds.description: Estimated remaining duration in seconds based on window RPM. Null if not calculable.

throttlePolicyName.description: Name of the currently active throttle policy.

throttlePolicySlug.description: Slug of the currently active throttle policy.

pumpBatchSize.description: Current pump batch size from the active throttle policy.

pumpDelayMs.description: Current pump delay in milliseconds from the active throttle policy.

DeleteDataResponse.description: Response when cleanse data is deleted.

deletedAtUtc.description: UTC timestamp when the deletion was performed.

CleanseAnalysisOperationSummaryDto.description: Summary of a cleanse analysis operation.

recordsAnalyzed.description: Number of records analyzed so far.

totalRecords.description: Total number of records to analyze.

durationMs.description: Total duration in milliseconds when complete.

reportObjectKey.description: S3 object key for the generated report.

reportUrl.description: Presigned URL to download the report.

finalAverageRpm.description: Final average records per minute when completed.

cancelledAtUtc.description: UTC timestamp when the operation was cancelled.

stats.description: Live performance statistics. Only populated for running or cancelling operations.

CleanseAnalysisOperationDto.description: Full details of a cleanse analysis operation.

status.description: Operation status: NotStarted, Running, Completed, Failed, Cancelling, or Cancelled. After cancel-analysis is called, the status transitions Running → Cancelling → Cancelled.

recordsAnalyzed.description: Number of records analyzed so far.

totalRecords.description: Total number of records to analyze.

error.description: Error message if the operation failed.

durationMs.description: Total duration in milliseconds when complete.

reportObjectKey.description: S3 object key for the generated report.

reportUrl.description: Presigned URL to download the report.

finalAverageRpm.description: Final average records per minute when completed or cancelled.

cancelledAtUtc.description: UTC timestamp when the operation was cancelled.

stats.description: Live performance statistics. Only populated for running or cancelling operations.

RegenerateUrlResponse.description: Response when a report URL is regenerated.

regeneratedAtUtc.description: UTC timestamp when the URL was regenerated.

success.description: Whether the test notification was sent successfully.

sentAtUtc.description: UTC timestamp when the notification was sent.

PerformedByRequest.description: Request body containing only the performing user. Used by ignore, unignore, and unassign operations.

performedBy.description: Identifier of the user performing the action.

UpdateResolutionStatusRequest.description: Request body for updating the resolution status of an issue.

status.description: New resolution status (None, Todo, InProgress, Resolved).

performedBy.description: Identifier of the user performing the action.

AssignIssueRequest.description: Request body for assigning an issue to a user.

assignedTo.description: Identifier of the user to assign the issue to.

performedBy.description: Identifier of the user performing the action.

IssueHistoryResponse.description: Response for paginated issue history entries.

items.description: A history/lineage entry for an issue.

StartBulkImportResponse.description: Response when a bulk import is successfully started.

importId.description: Unique identifier for the started import.

sourceType.description: Source type of the import ('internal' or 'external').

startedAt.description: UTC timestamp when the import was started.

ImportSummariesResponse.description: Response for a paginated list of import summaries.

count.description: Actual number of import summaries returned.

status.description: Current status of the import (Started, Completed, or Failed).

startedAtUtc.description: UTC timestamp when the import started.

completedAtUtc.description: UTC timestamp when the import completed, or null if still in progress.

filesProcessed.description: Total number of files processed during ingestion.

ImportReport.description: Comprehensive report of an import operation.

sourceType.description: Source type of the import ('internal' or 'external').

startedAtUtc.description: UTC timestamp when the import started.

completedAtUtc.description: UTC timestamp when the import completed.

error.description: Error message if the import failed.

FileReportsResponse.description: Response containing file processing reports for a specific import.

importId.description: Import ID these file reports belong to.

totalFiles.description: Total number of files in this import.

PaginatedLineageEvents.description: Paginated list of lineage events for a record.

collectionName.description: Name of the collection containing the record.

totalEvents.description: Total number of events for this record.

top.description: Maximum number of events to return.

count.description: Actual number of events returned in this page.

items.description: A lineage event for a record.

createdAtUtc.description: UTC timestamp when the record was created.

lastModifiedAtUtc.description: UTC timestamp when the record was last modified.

createdByImport.description: Import ID that created this record.

lastModifiedByImport.description: Import ID that last modified this record.

DeleteCollectionResponse.description: Response when a specific MongoDB collection is successfully deleted.

deletedAtUtc.description: UTC timestamp when the collection was deleted.

DeleteCollectionsResponse.description: Response when multiple MongoDB collections are successfully deleted.

deletedCollections.description: List of collection names that were deleted.

success.description: Whether the deletion operation was successful.

deletedAtUtc.description: UTC timestamp when the collections were deleted.

GenerateRecordIdRequest.description: Request to generate a record ID from composite key parts.

keyParts.description: Individual parts of the composite key (in order). Each part will be joined and hashed to create the record ID.

GenerateRecordIdResponse.description: Response containing the generated record ID.

recordId.description: Generated URL-safe record ID (SHA256 hash, 43 characters). Can be used to query lineage events.

keyParts.description: Key parts used to generate the record ID.

timestamp.description: Timestamp when the ID was generated.

ClearDownStorageResponse.description: Response from clearing down internal storage.

deletedKeys.description: List of object keys that were deleted.

deletedAtUtc.description: UTC timestamp when the clear down operation completed.

size.description: Size of the uploaded file in bytes.

contentType.description: Content type of the uploaded file.

ValidationProblemDetails.description: RFC 7807 Problem Details with validation errors.

isActive.description: Whether the policy is currently active.

isReadOnly.description: Whether the policy is read-only (cannot be modified).

createdAtUtc.description: UTC timestamp when the policy was created.

updatedAtUtc.description: UTC timestamp when the policy was last updated.

CreateThrottlePolicyCommand.description: Command to create a new throttle policy.

UpdateThrottlePolicyCommand.description: Command to update an existing throttle policy.

tags.name: Cleanse
tags.description: Cleanse analysis and issue management operations.

tags.name: Import
tags.description: Data import, lineage, collection management, and storage operations.

tags.name: ExternalCatalogue
tags.description: External catalogue file listing and upload operations.

tags.name: Query
tags.description: OData-style dynamic querying of MongoDB collections.

tags.name: ThrottlePolicies
tags.description: Throttle policy CRUD and activation management.
